regions.text: When drawing a circle, each part of the curve guides the next. You learn by doing. (Illustration: A hand drawing a curve).
A good speaker designs their speech based on what they've said and how the audience reacts. They can change the design if needed.
Everything we do starts with a purpose, though we aren't always fully aware of it at the time. Reflection often reveals deeper meaning later.
design: to plan what should be done and how. FUTURE: will design. PRESENT: design(s). PAST: designed.
